license: Repo-authored fixture for this project; no third-party text source.
decision: Use the PHASE-04A repo-authored English/Japanese/mixed corpus for local 30M scale wiring evidence.
ratio_summary: 14 English records, 13 Japanese records, and 9 mixed Japanese/English records, approximately 39/36/25 by record count.

split.method: Deterministic sha256 ordering by seed, record id, and normalized text hash with validation_fraction=0.20.

dedup_strategy: Unicode NFKC normalization, line-ending normalization, trailing-space trim, then exact normalized text sha256 deduplication.
limitations: The corpus is intentionally tiny and repo-authored; it validates scale wiring, not broad model quality.
The mixture is record-count based, not token-count balanced.
Larger PHASE-05A or later datasets must keep source/license and ratio decisions explicit before longer training.
